reason: Verify global TianChen-RV boundaries and source-of-truth discipline.
Check no unsupported RVV runtime/correctness/performance claim is made without ssh rvv evidence.
Check runtime_param use stays generic and core remains target-neutral.
Check runtime AVL/VL, selected config, and descriptor-local count boundaries remain RVV plugin/target owned.
Check hardware facts, compile-time config, runtime values, and descriptor-local values stay layered.
Check source/header/object export validates runtime ABI and selected-plan metadata before artifact output.
Check generated RVV C remains on the common EmitC/intrinsic route and descriptors stay non-authoritative.
Check focused build, lit, C++ tests, and evidence wording match project policy.
